title: Inavolisib-Based Therapy for PIK3CA-Mutated Advanced Male Breast Cancer: A Cost-Effectiveness Analysis.
abstract: The Phase III INAVO120 trial established inavolisib-based therapy as a superior first-line treatment for PIK3CA-mutated, HR-positive, HER2-negative advanced breast cancer, a finding of particular importance for the historically underrepresented male population with high unmet need.
trial_name: Inavolisib-Based Therapy in PIK3CA-Mutated Advanced Breast Cancer
